name: Lemon Poppy Seed Cake Drnd29a
recipeIngredient: Kraft Touch of Butter Spread, 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, beat together the butter spread, 1 1/2 cups sugar, and cream cheese until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks and lemon juice; mix well.
4. Sift in flour, baking powder, and baking soda; stir to combine.
5. Fold in poppy seeds and lemon peel.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until foamy.
7. Gradually add the remaining 1/4 cup sugar to the egg whites, beating until soft peaks form.
8. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the batter.
9. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
10. Bake in the preheated oven for 55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Let cool in the pan for 5 minutes, then remove from the pan and allow to cool completely.
12. For the glaze, mix powdered sugar and lemon juice until smooth.
13. Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cake.
From the Official U.S. Olympic Training Table Cookbook
Formatted by Rose Capoccia
